 --------------- 1137_NL_mud_splash.ai ---------------
OPCODE_255 9 112 11 0 
OPCODE_255 9 128 1 0 
COMMENT: NL:  This is a horribly messy script that was Frankensteined from Jimmy's Splash Master script
COMMENT: NL:  A lot of the old parts of his script have just been commented out.  Maybe one day I'll just remove them completely
COMMENT: NL:  This script detects if the Global Leader is hitting the actor running this script.  The actor will have a collision box the size of the mud area
COMMENT: NL:  Each time the player hits the actor, it generates a splash (+noise) and goes into a wake particle routine that is based on the player's current speed
COMMENT: NL:  Upon exiting the mud pit (ie. no collision) "mud_switch" ungates the splashing part of the routine
COMMENT: NL:  "in mud" generates ripples.  This is ripped from the Splash Master
COMMENT: NL:  Mud_Friction is the factor by which the player's speed is reduced in the mud.  Setting this speed is gated by  "slow_speed_once"
COMMENT: NL:  some variables were renamed.  ex. in water --> in mud
